---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Tableau Stimulator
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: cssadewale
---

## Feature Summary

A clear one-line title for the feature you are requesting.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What currently cannot be done?

Example: "I cannot export my pivot table as a PDF. I can only export as CSV,
but my clients need a formatted PDF report."

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you imagine the feature working:
- Where would the button/control appear?
- How would the user interact with it?
- What would the output look like?

## Reference Example

Does a similar feature exist in Tableau, Power BI, or Excel? Describe how it
works there and link a screenshot if possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any workarounds you have tried? Why are they insufficient?

## Use Case

A concrete real-world scenario where this feature would be used.

Example: "I work with WAEC result data for HMG Academy. I need to show parents
a breakdown of their child's scores across subjects. A radar chart per student
would be ideal, but I need to filter to one student at a time."

## Priority

- [ ] Nice to have — improves workflow but not urgent
- [ ] Important — significantly improves a common use case
- [ ] Critical — blocking a major use case

## Additional Context

Any other information, links, or screenshots.
